nasb.text: and in the valley, Beth-haram and Beth-nimrah and Succoth and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, with the Jordan as a border, as far as the lower end of the Sea of Chinnereth beyond the Jordan to the east.

esv.text: and in the valley Beth-haram, Beth-nimrah, Succoth, and Zaphon, the rest of the kingdom of Sihon king of Heshbon, having the Jordan as a boundary, to the lower end of the Sea of Chinnereth, eastward beyond the Jordan.

cnv.text: 還有在谷中的伯．亞蘭、伯．寧拉、疏割、撒分，就是希實本王西宏國中的餘地，以約旦河作疆界，直到基尼烈海的底端，都在約旦河東。

ccb.text: 还有谷中的伯亚兰、伯·宁拉、疏割、撒分，就是希实本王西宏国中其余的土地，以约旦河为界，沿东岸直到加利利海的顶端。
